languages.text: Могущество протектората фон Валанциус ширилось и росло, привлекая под его власть новые территории, новых людей и новые ресурсы. Владения династии наводнились странными механизмами, что работали денно и нощно, приводили в трепет и изумление одних жрецов Омниссии и вызывали страшный гнев у других. Машины, дарованные династии ее загадочным покровителем в обмен на великое предательство, были лишены души, и столь же бездушным стал однажды и Вольный Торговец. Ужас перед {mf|ним|ней} держал протекторат в безоговорочном подчинении.

The power of the von Valancius protectorate grew and grew, bringing new territories, people, and resources under its control. The dynasty's possessions were full of strange machines that worked night and day, leaving some priests of the Omnissiah in awe and amazement and others fiercely angry. The machines, given to the dynasty by its mysterious patron in exchange for the great betrayal, were devoid of souls, and the Rogue Trader became equally soulless in the end. Fear of {mf|him|her} kept the protectorate in a state of unquestioning submission.

languages.text: フォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領は勢力を拡大し、新たな領土、人々、資源を支配下に置いた。その王朝は、夜昼を問わず稼働する奇妙な機械で満たされていた。その機械は、大いなる裏切りに代償として、謎の守護者によって王朝に与えられたもので、魂を持たなかった。そして、その結果、ローグ・トレーダーもまた魂を失った。{mf|彼|彼女}に対する恐怖は、保護領を疑うことなく従順な状態に保っていた。
languages.original_text: The power of the von Valancius protectorate grew and grew, bringing new territories, people, and resources under its control. The dynasty's possessions were full of strange machines that worked night and day, leaving some priests of the Omnissiah in awe and amazement and others fiercely angry. The machines, given to the dynasty by its mysterious patron in exchange for the great betrayal, were devoid of souls, and the Rogue Trader became equally soulless in the end. Fear of {mf|him|her} kept the protectorate in a state of unquestioning submission.

traits.locale_text: フォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領は勢力を拡大し、新たな領土、人々、資源を支配下に置いた。その王朝は、夜昼を問わず稼働する奇妙な機械で満たされていた。その機械は、大いなる裏切りに代償として、謎の守護者によって王朝に与えられたもので、魂を持たなかった。そして、その結果、ローグ・トレーダーもまた魂を失った。{mf|彼|彼女}に対する恐怖は、保護領を疑うことなく従順な状態に保っていた。

languages.text: 冯·瓦兰修斯属地的势力不断扩张，将新的领土、人口和资源纳入掌控。王朝的领地里满是日夜运转的诡异机械。它们让一些欧姆尼赛亚祭司既敬畏又惊叹，也让另一些人怒火中烧。作为那场惊天背叛的酬劳，某个神秘赞助人将这些机器赠予了王朝。它们没有灵魂，而这位行商浪人最终也变得同样毫无灵魂。对行商浪人的恐惧，让属地始终处于绝对的臣服之中。
languages.original_text: The power of the von Valancius protectorate grew and grew, bringing new territories, people, and resources under its control. The dynasty's possessions were full of strange machines that worked night and day, leaving some priests of the Omnissiah in awe and amazement and others fiercely angry. Fear of {mf|him|her} kept the protectorate in a state of unquestioning submission.

traits.locale_text: 冯·瓦兰修斯属地的势力不断扩张，将新的领土、人口和资源纳入掌控。王朝的领地里满是日夜运转的诡异机械。它们让一些欧姆尼赛亚祭司既敬畏又惊叹，也让另一些人怒火中烧。作为那场惊天背叛的酬劳，某个神秘赞助人将这些机器赠予了王朝。它们没有灵魂，而这位行商浪人最终也变得同样毫无灵魂。对行商浪人的恐惧，让属地始终处于绝对的臣服之中。

languages.text: Le protectorat von Valancius continua à accroître sa puissance en prenant le contrôle de plus en plus de territoires, de personnes et de ressources. Ses domaines regorgeaient d'étranges machines qui travaillaient nuit et jour, suscitant aussi bien l'ébahissement que la colère parmi les prêtres de l'Omnimessie. Ces machines, offertes à la dynastie par son mystérieux bienfaiteur en échange de la grande trahison, étaient dénuées d'âme, et {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} finit {mf|lui|elle}-même par perdre la sienne. La crainte qu'{mf|il|elle} inspirait à tous ses sujets assurait la soumission totale du protectorat.
languages.original_text: The power of the von Valancius protectorate grew and grew, bringing new territories, people, and resources under its control. The dynasty's possessions were full of strange machines that worked night and day, leaving some priests of the Omnissiah in awe and amazement and others fiercely angry. The machines, given to the dynasty by its mysterious patron in exchange for the great betrayal, were devoid of souls, and the Rogue Trader became equally soulless in the end. Fear of {mf|him|her} kept the protectorate in a state of unquestioning submission.

Ces machines, offertes à la dynastie par son mystérieux bienfaiteur en échange de la grande trahison, étaient dénuées d'âme, et {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} finit {mf|lui|elle}-même par perdre la sienne. La crainte qu'{mf|il|elle} inspirait à tous ses sujets assurait la soumission totale du protectorat.

languages.text: El poder del protectorado von Valancius creció sin control mientras sumaba más territorios, súbditos y recursos a su dominio. Las posesiones de la dinastía estaban llenas de máquinas extrañas que trabajaban día y noche, lo que despertaba la admiración y el asombro de algunos sirvientes del Omnissiah y la furia en otros. Las máquinas, recompensa del misterioso patrón de la dinastía por su gran traición, carecían de almas, y {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente también acabó perdiendo la suya al final. El miedo a su figura mantuvo al protectorado en un estado de sumisión absoluta.

languages.text: Von Valancius protektorasının gücü giderek arttı ve yeni bölgeleri, insanları ve kaynakları kontrolü altına aldı. Hanedanlığın mülkleri gece gündüz çalışan tuhaf makinelerle dolup taştı. Bu durum bazı Hermesih rahiplerini huşu içinde bırakırken bazısını şiddetle öfkelendirdi. Büyük ihanet karşılığında gizemli hamisi tarafından hanedanlığa verilen makineler ruhlardan yoksundu, Hür Tacir de sonunda aynı derecede ruhsuzlaştı. Kendisine duyulan korku, protektorayı sorgusuz sualsiz bir itaat durumunda tuttu.
languages.original_text: The power of the von Valancius protectorate grew and grew, bringing new territories, people, and resources under its control. The dynasty's possessions were full of strange machines that worked night and day, leaving some priests of the Omnissiah in awe and amazement and others fiercely angry. traits.locale_text: Von Valancius protektorasının gücü giderek arttı ve yeni bölgeleri, insanları ve kaynakları kontrolü altına aldı. Büyük ihanet karşılığında gizemli hamisi tarafından hanedanlığa verilen makineler ruhlardan yoksundu, Hür Tacir de sonunda aynı derecede ruhsuzlaştı. Kendisine duyulan korku, protektorayı sorgusuz sualsiz bir itaat durumunda tuttu.

languages.text: Die Macht des Protektorats derer von Valancius wuchs und wuchs, während es neue Territorien, Völker und Ressourcen unter seine Kontrolle brachte. Die Besitzungen der Dynastie umfassten allerlei seltsame Maschinen, die bei einigen Priestern des Omnissiah Ehrfurcht und Bewunderung, bei anderen hingegen offene Wut weckten. Die Maschinen, die der Dynastie von ihrem geheimnisvollen Gönner für ihren Verrat gewährt wurden, hatten keine Seelen, und auch {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} war am Ende seelenlos. Aus Angst vor {mf|ihm|ihr} änderte sich zunächst nichts am Herrschaftsanspruch des Protektorats.
